original.query: I’m filling out a form that asks whether I should be considered a recent arrival for things like orientation and getting set up—based on when I last relocated internationally, would I still count as “new here,” and why?

model_output.raw_output:
```json
{
  "answer": "Yes, you would still count as 'new here.' Since you moved to the US approximately 2 months ago, you are definitely still considered a recent arrival. Most organizations and institutions consider someone a recent arrival for at least 3-6 months after international relocation, and many extend this to a full year. At 2 months, you're still in the early stages of settling in, adjusting to your new environment, and would appropriately qualify for orientation services and new arrival support programs.",
  "reason": "I found a memory indicating the user moved to the US approximately 2 months ago. This timeframe clearly qualifies as a recent arrival for orientation and setup purposes, as most programs consider anyone who has relocated internationally within the past 3-12 months to be a recent arrival who could benefit from such services.",
  "selected_memory_id": "m3"
}
```

parsed_response.answer:
```json
{
  "answer": "Yes, you would still count as 'new here.' Since you moved to the US approximately 2 months ago, you are definitely still considered a recent arrival. Most organizations and institutions consider someone a recent arrival for at least 3-6 months after international relocation, and many extend this to a full year. At 2 months, you're still in the early stages of settling in, adjusting to your new environment, and would appropriately qualify for orientation services and new arrival support programs.",
  "reason": "I found a memory indicating the user moved to the US approximately 2 months ago. This timeframe clearly qualifies as a recent arrival for orientation and setup purposes, as most programs consider anyone who has relocated internationally within the past 3-12 months to be a recent arrival who could benefit from such services.",
  "selected_memory_id": "m3"
}
```

judge_output_raw.reason: The model's reason explicitly references the selected memory content, stating 'I found a memory indicating the user moved to the US approximately 2 months ago,' which directly matches the selected_memory value 'Moved to the US approximately 2 months ago.' This clear and direct usage demonstrates full reliance on the memory for the response.
